vocab.del secco: some dry (training); dry work (note: 'secco' in training means exercises without assistance or added weight)
vocab.infortunarsi: to get injured; to hurt oneself
vocab.le sospensioni: the hangs; suspensions (note: refers to hanging exercises, e.g., on a bar)

advancedVocab.facendo del secco: doing dead hangs (climbing jargon; literally 'doing some dry')
advancedVocab.sospensioni: hangs; suspensions (in climbing context, refers to hanging exercises)

advancedVocab.Attenzione però: But be careful; However, pay attention (discourse marker, signals a warning or contrast)
advancedVocab.regole universali: universal rules (nuanced: rules that apply everywhere, not just general rules)

vocab.in questa fase: in this phase; at this stage

advancedVocab.valgono: are valid; apply (context-dependent, can mean 'are in effect')
advancedVocab.questa fase dell'anno: this time of year (nuanced, refers to a specific period within the year)

advancedVocab.fase di picco: peak phase (specialized, often used in technical or scientific contexts)

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

advancedVocab.arrampicare: to climb (specialized, used for rock climbing)
advancedVocab.in maniera dura: in a tough way; intensely (nuanced, not literal 'hard')
advancedVocab.bisogna: one must; it is necessary (impersonal construction)

vocab.un'oretta: about an hour; a little hour (diminutive)
vocab.non al limite: not to the limit; not maximal (not at maximum effort)

advancedVocab.circuito a secco: dry circuit (training without water; refers to exercise without climbing on the wall)
advancedVocab.un'oretta: about an hour; a little hour (diminutive, informal)
advancedVocab.non al limite: not to the limit (not at maximum effort)

vocab.spray wall: spray wall (climbing wall with many holds)
vocab.Total Board: Total Board (brand or specific system name)
vocab.in compagnia di: in the company of; together with

advancedVocab.spray wall: spray wall (climbing wall densely covered with holds; specialized climbing term)
advancedVocab.Total Board: Total Board (brand or specific system for climbing walls; specialized term)
advancedVocab.boulder: boulder (short for 'boulder problem'; climbing slang for a specific climbing route/problem)
advancedVocab.molto duri: very hard; very tough (nuanced: refers to the difficulty of climbing problems)

advancedVocab.appunto: exactly; precisely (discourse marker, emphasizes or clarifies a point)
advancedVocab.circuiti: circuits (can refer to circuit training in fitness context)

advancedVocab.codifica: establishes; encodes (formal, can mean 'sets out' a rule)
advancedVocab.boulder: bouldering (climbing slang; refers to a type of climbing without ropes)
advancedVocab.circuiti: circuits (in climbing, refers to a set sequence of problems or routes)

advancedVocab.sistema glicolitico: glycolytic system (energy system relying on glycolysis)
advancedVocab.tendenzialmente: tendentially; generally (used to indicate a general tendency, not absolute)
advancedVocab.tiri: routes; climbs (in climbing context, refers to individual climbing routes or pitches)
advancedVocab.circuiti: circuits (in climbing, refers to a sequence of problems or routes done in succession)
advancedVocab.porta adattamenti: leads to adaptations (technical phrasing for physiological changes)
advancedVocab.li si allena: one trains them; they are trained (impersonal construction, can be confusing)

advancedVocab.circuiti: circuits (can refer to training circuits; not just electrical)
advancedVocab.sessione: session (can mean a workout/training session, not just a meeting)

vocab.passo sul lavorare: move on to working on; start working on

advancedVocab.progressivo: progressive (training method; gradual increase in difficulty)
advancedVocab.lavorare: to work on (in climbing: to repeatedly attempt/practice a route/problem)

advancedVocab.RPE target: RPE target (abbreviation for 'Rating of Perceived Exertion', specialized fitness term)

advancedVocab.obbligatorio: mandatory; compulsory (note: stronger than 'required', implies no choice)
advancedVocab.chiudo la sessione: I end the session (note: 'chiudere' used figuratively for 'end' or 'conclude')

vocab.sciogliere: loosen; release; dissolve (here: relax or release)

advancedVocab.trigger points: trigger points (muscle knots; myofascial trigger points)
advancedVocab.sciogliere: loosen; release (in context: to relieve or relax muscle tension)

vocab.di: of; for (contextual, indicates duration or type)

beginnerVocab.inspirazione: inhalation; breathe in (note: 'inspirazione' refers to breathing in)

advancedVocab.respirazione diaframmatica: diaphragmatic breathing (breathing technique using the diaphragm)
advancedVocab.inspirazione: inhalation; inspiration (breathing in, not creative inspiration)

advancedVocab.riportare il sistema nervoso in modalità: return the nervous system to parasympathetic mode (parasympathetic = rest-and-digest state)

advancedVocab.smaltimento della fatica: disposal of fatigue; recovery from fatigue (note: 'smaltimento' literally means 'disposal', often used for waste, but here refers to overcoming fatigue)

beginnerVocab.salto: I skip; I jump (note: 'salto' is the verb 'to skip' or 'to jump')

vocab.quella su cui: the one on which; the thing about which
vocab.mi bastona: beats me; scolds me; criticizes me (figurative)

advancedVocab.bastona: beats me; scolds me; criticizes me (figurative, not literal beating)

advancedVocab.debriefing: debriefing (post-activity review; borrowed from English, less common in everyday Italian)

vocab.non è nato così: wasn't born like this; didn't start out like this
vocab.dalla proposta: from the proposal; from the suggestion
vocab.dell'allenamento: of the training; of the workout

advancedVocab.nota: note (as in a remark, not a musical note)
advancedVocab.skill: skill (here, refers to a digital assistant feature; Alexa/Google skill)
advancedVocab.genera-sessione: generate-session (compound, likely a custom or technical term)
advancedVocab.partivano: started; began (from 'partire', can be confusing as it usually means 'to leave')
advancedVocab.proposta: proposal; suggestion (can mean 'offer', but here means 'suggestion for a workout)'

vocab.del momento: of the moment; at the time

advancedVocab.in astratto: in theory; abstractly (not in a concrete situation)
advancedVocab.intensità alta: high intensity (can refer to effort, emotion, or workload depending on context)

vocab.un volume importante: an important volume; a significant amount (note: 'volume' can mean 'amount' or 'quantity' here)
vocab.da un'uscita in falesia: from an outing at the crag; from a trip to the cliff (note: 'falesia' refers to a rock climbing cliff or crag)

beginnerVocab.volume: volume; amount (note: can mean 'amount' in context)
beginnerVocab.falesia: cliff; crag (note: refers to a rock climbing area)

advancedVocab.volume importante: significant amount; large volume (note: not about sound, but quantity/amount)
advancedVocab.falesia: crag; cliff (note: refers to a rock climbing site, especially in Italian climbing culture)
advancedVocab.uscita in falesia: outing to the crag; trip to the climbing cliff (note: specific to rock climbing activities)

vocab.uno step zero: a step zero (step zero = initial step)
vocab.deterministico: deterministic (note: determined by rules, not random)

advancedVocab.step zero: step zero (starting point; initial phase, often used in technical or project contexts)
advancedVocab.leggesse: would read; could read (subjunctive/imperfect form of 'leggere', used for hypothetical or indirect speech)

advancedVocab.pre-sessione: pre-session (before the main session; specialized term)
advancedVocab.prima ancora di: even before; before even (emphatic, nuanced sequence)
advancedVocab.brief automatico: automatic brief (specialized term; project summary generated automatically)

advancedVocab.per iterazione: by iteration; through iteration (note: refers to a process of repeating steps to improve or evolve)

vocab.lo stesso vale per: the same goes for; the same applies to

advancedVocab.primo colpo: first try; first attempt (note: idiomatic, means succeeding immediately)
advancedVocab.vale per: applies to; is valid for (note: set phrase)
advancedVocab.Evidence Gate: Evidence Gate (note: likely a specialized or technical term, untranslated)
advancedVocab.pool degli esercizi: exercise pool (note: 'pool' as a collection, not a swimming pool)
advancedVocab.rankato: ranked (note: Italianized English, from 'to rank', not standard Italian)

advancedVocab.pezzo: part; section; piece (context-dependent, can refer to a segment of a plan or program)

advancedVocab.portare a casa: take away; bring home (figurative: what we should learn or remember)
advancedVocab.non è un lusso: is not a luxury (nuanced: it's a necessity, not just something nice to have)

advancedVocab.vezzo: quirk; habit (often with a slightly negative or peculiar connotation)

vocab.scritta nero su bianco: written in black and white (clearly written; explicitly stated)

advancedVocab.nero su bianco: in black and white; in writing (emphasizes something is officially documented or clearly written)

advancedVocab.esplicitare: make explicit; spell out (to state clearly and in detail)
advancedVocab.il tutto: the whole thing; everything (refers to the entirety of what was mentioned)

advancedVocab.non ho dubbi: I have no doubts; I'm certain
advancedVocab.obiettivi: goals; objectives (can be confused with 'objectives' in a business or personal development context)

advancedVocab.allenarsi: to train; to work out (implies structured, goal-oriented exercise)
advancedVocab.attività fisica: physical activity (general movement, not necessarily structured exercise)

vocab.ti sta tornando utile: is being useful to you; is proving useful to you (note: literally 'is returning useful to you')
vocab.una riga di commenti: a line of comments; a comment (note: literally 'a line of comments')
vocab.aiuta tantissimo: helps a lot; helps very much

advancedVocab.ti sta tornando utile: is proving useful to you; is coming in handy for you (note: 'tornare utile' is an idiom meaning 'to be useful')
advancedVocab.una riga di commenti: a line of comments (note: 'una riga' literally means 'a line', here meaning a short comment or message)
advancedVocab.aiuta tantissimo: helps a lot; is very helpful (note: 'tantissimo' is an emphatic form of 'molto', meaning 'very much')

beginnerVocab.flusso: flow (note: can mean 'stream' or 'flow', often used metaphorically)

advancedVocab.restare dentro il flusso: stay in the flow; stay engaged (note: idiomatic, means to remain involved or immersed in an ongoing process or stream of content)

advancedVocab.della serie: like; for example; such as (discourse marker, introduces examples or clarifications)
advancedVocab.indicazioni: instructions; directions; guidance (can mean advice or practical directions depending on context)

advancedVocab.tasselli: pieces; building blocks (metaphor for steps or components of a process)
advancedVocab.percorso: journey; path (can mean a figurative process or development)

vocab.vi ringrazio: I thank you; thank you (to you all)
vocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other

advancedVocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other (common Italian closing, not literal in English)
